seoTitle: Timbumburi vs Timor — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Timbumburi and Timor. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Timbumburi and Timor.
heading: Timbumburi vs Timor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Timbumburi, New South Wales and Timor, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Timbumburi has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Timor (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Timbumburi or Timor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Timbumburi has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Timor scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Timbumburi scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Timor scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Timbumburi or Timor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Timbumburi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
